value:
MAP Weapons are extremely powerful and cannot be countered.
In this stage, the enemy will use MAP Weapons when 2 or more
allied units are within range, so plan your route carefully.

There are enemies with extremely high ATK and the Guaranteed
Chance Step (force-activate Chance Step 1 time) ability.
Exploit the gaps in the enemy's weapon range to avoid being hit.

Multiple enemies with the Support Attack ability appear.
Use Sway (increase own EVA by 100%) to reduce the number of
Support Attacks that the enemy can land.

MAP Weapons are extremely powerful and cannot be countered.
In this stage, the enemy will use MAP Weapons when 2 or more
allied units are within range, so plan your route carefully.

Multiple enemies with high ATK and the Guaranteed Chance Step
(force-activate Chance Step 1 time) ability are deployed in this
stage. Leverage MAP Weapons to devastate the enemy on turn 1.

Enemies with red effects have powerful abilities.
Prioritize the enemy with "Increased DEF (All)" to defeat
the rest efficiently.

A large number of enemy units are deployed in this stage,
and as you clear mission objectives, even more will appear.
Leverage MAP Weapons to defeat the enemy efficiently.
